subject: Re: Winter showcase running order
body:
Chris — here's my proposed order for Act I. I moved the corps piece before the pas de deux so we can reset the stage. Let me know if lighting can handle the change.

Jason

subject: Costume fitting schedule
body:
Patricia, can we get the intermediate ballet fittings on the books for the first week of December? Mornings work best before classes start.

Jason

subject: Dinner with your parents
body:
Are we still on for dinner with your parents Sunday? I can leave the studio by five if Chris covers the late class.

Jason

subject: Lighting cues for Act II
body:
Dave, attaching my notes on the Act II lighting. The diagonal needs a slow fade, not a snap. Can we run it at the tech rehearsal?

Jason

subject: Summer intensive planning
body:
Lisa, do you have a headcount estimate for the summer intensive yet? I want to lock studio time before the spring calendar fills up.

Jason

subject: Casting for the winter showcase
body:
Chris, I've drafted casting for the two advanced pieces. A couple of the leads overlap — can we talk through the doubling before I post it?

Jason

subject: Re: Spring collaboration
body:
Mike, I'm interested in the joint piece. Let me check which of my advanced dancers are free on Sundays and I'll get back to you this week.

Jason

subject: Showcase ticket reminder
body:
Reminder to families: winter showcase tickets go on sale Monday through the studio's Eventbrite page. Reserved seating is limited this year.

Jason

subject: Music edits for the recital
body:
Patricia, the recital audio edits are in the shared folder, labeled by running order. Can you confirm the sound tech has them before Friday?

Jason

subject: Pickup Wednesday
body:
I'll cover pickup Wednesday and shift my afternoon class earlier. Can you take Tyler to soccer if I run late at the studio?

Jason

subject: Studio B schedule conflict
body:
Chris, the new adult beginner section overlaps with my intermediate rehearsal in Studio B. Can we move one to Studio A?

Jason

subject: Tech rehearsal timing
body:
Dave, let's plan the tech rehearsal for the Saturday before the showcase. I'll need at least three hours for lighting and spacing.

Jason

subject: Front desk coverage
body:
Lisa, can you cover the front desk Monday morning? Patricia's out and I'm teaching the beginner block.

Jason

subject: Coffee before the council meeting
body:
Mike, coffee before Thursday's arts council meeting sounds good. 8:30 at the park place? I want to go over the grant draft.

Jason

subject: Nutcracker excerpt casting
body:
Chris, I think we can pull off the Nutcracker excerpt to close the showcase. I'll need two more rehearsal slots for the party scene.

Jason

subject: Parent viewing week
body:
Families: parent viewing week starts Monday. You're welcome to observe the last fifteen minutes of each class from the studio windows.

Jason

subject: Registration numbers
body:
Patricia, can you send me the updated winter registration numbers? I want to see whether the jazz sections need combining.

Jason

subject: Barbara's recital
body:
Let's all go to my mom's Rittenhouse recital next month. I'll ask her the date so we can work it around the showcase.

Jason

subject: Set piece storage
body:
Dave, where are we storing the Act I set pieces between rehearsals? Studio A is getting crowded and I don't want them scuffed.

Jason

subject: Faculty meeting follow-up
body:
Chris, following up on the faculty meeting — I'll take the rehearsal schedule item and circulate a draft before next week.

Jason
